prestazioni: 2UR-GSE 5.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine: Full bolt-on package with HKS Hi-Power 4.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system (cat-back, 76mm piping, titanium tips), Tomei 2.5-inch stainless steel headers (equal-length, 4-2-1 design), and Apexi Power Intake (ram-air, heat-shielded, 85mm inlet diameter) for optimized scavenging and throttle response at 7,300 RPM redline.

Forced induction conversion using a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit (2.3L Eaton TVS rotor, 8.5psi base boost, integrated air-to-water intercooler, 1000cc injectors, and custom ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone) paired with a CSF high-capacity radiator (dual-pass, 45mm core) and Koyorad 53mm front-mount intercooler (bar-and-plate, 1200cfm airflow) to sustain 650whp on 93 octane.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 20-way compression/rebound, 40mm piston diameter, 12kg/mm front/14kg/mm rear springs) mated to Cusco Type RS 22mm front/18mm rear adjustable sway bars (3-position, solid construction) and Whiteline ALK (Adjustable Lateral Knuckle) bushings for sub-3.5 second 0-60mph launches with zero wheel hop.
estetica: Varis Japan widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper with integrated diffuser; 20mm extended wheel arches, OEM-grade fitment) paired with a Veilside Fortune 3 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, 30mm adjustable Gurney flap) for -120kg downforce at 150mph.

Enkei PF07 wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x11 +30 rear, 9.5kg per wheel, 5x114.3 PCD) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear, semi-slick compound) with DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors (355mm front, 340mm rear, 6-piston calipers, slotted and dimpled) for track-ready grip.

Full interior weight reduction via Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (carbon-Kevlar shell, 8-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, 12kg each) and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point main hoop, gusseted door bars, integrated fire suppression system) with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, Alcantara, quick-release hub) and AIM MXS Strada dash (12-inch display, CAN bus integration, lap timer).
